# EgoNN: Egocentric Neural Network for Point Cloud Based 6DoF Relocalization at the City Scale

- **Reviewed version:** `doi:10.1109/lra.2021.3133593`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** MulRan, Apollo-SouthBay, KITTI Odometry — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **input_unit:** single ground-removed raw scan from a rotating 3D LiDAR, the map is a database of geotagged scans — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–4, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **invariances:** yaw rotation for the learned global descriptor, supported architecturally and empirically but not exact under discretization, no translation invariance — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–6, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **representation:** cylindrical sparse occupied voxels, shared 3D-convolutional feature pyramid, GeM 256-D global descriptor, regressed keypoints, saliency uncertainty and 128-D local descriptors, global retrieval followed by local matching and RANSAC 6-DoF pose estimation — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-7;Table I-V
